title: The Guidance Scale Knob
concept: A guidance scale parameter controls how strongly the output follows the condition: higher values mean stronger adherence but can reduce diversity.

exercises.prompt: When you ask a friend to draw 'a cat, but make it look REALLY like a cat', what are you doing?

options.text: Turning up how strictly they must follow your request
Asking them to ignore your request
Asking for a random drawing instead

exercises.explain: You're telling your friend to focus hard on matching exactly what you asked for — that's like turning up a guidance scale!

cards.title: Turn It Up... or Down?
cards.body: Imagine an AI art generator has a secret knob. Turn it up, and the AI listens super closely to your exact words. Turn it down, and the AI wanders off, adding its own surprising ideas. This knob is real — it's called the guidance scale!

cards.title: What Is Guidance Scale?
cards.body: Guidance scale is a setting that controls how strongly an AI's output must match the condition or prompt you gave it. A HIGH guidance scale means the AI sticks very closely to your instructions. A LOW guidance scale means the AI has more freedom to be creative and different from exactly what you asked.

cards.title: The Strict Tour Guide
cards.body: Think of guidance scale like a tour guide. A strict guide (high scale) makes sure you visit ONLY the exact spots on your list — precise but maybe boring. A relaxed guide (low scale) might take detours to cool surprise spots — more variety and adventure, but you might miss what you specifically asked for.

cards.title: Same Prompt, Different Knob
cards.body: Prompt: 'A red bicycle in a park.' With HIGH guidance scale, the AI draws exactly a red bicycle in a park, very precisely. With LOW guidance scale, the AI might draw a bicycle that's kind of red, in a garden-like scene, with unexpected extra details — less exact, but more unique and varied.

cards.title: Myth: Higher Is Always Better!
cards.body: Nope! Cranking guidance scale super high doesn't always mean better images. Too high can make pictures look strange, overly sharp, or 'forced,' and it reduces variety — every output starts looking similar. The best setting depends on what you want: precision or creative diversity.

cards.title: High vs. Low Guidance Scale
cards.body: Here's how the same prompt can turn out very differently depending on the guidance scale setting.

left.text: Follows the prompt very precisely, but images tend to look similar and less varied

right.text: Follows the prompt loosely, adds creative surprises, more variety between outputs

exercises.prompt: What does a HIGH guidance scale mainly cause an AI to do?

options.text: Slow down the AI's training process

exercises.explain: A high guidance scale tells the AI to stick tightly to what was asked, following the condition closely.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Increasing guidance scale can reduce the diversity of AI outputs.
exercises.explain: True! When guidance scale is pushed very high, outputs tend to become more similar to each other since the AI focuses tightly on matching the condition.

exercises.sentence: A ____ guidance scale means the AI sticks very closely to the given prompt.
exercises.explain: High guidance scale = strong adherence to the prompt or condition given to the AI.

exercises.prompt: An AI art tool made 10 images from the same prompt, and all 10 look almost identical with very precise details matching the prompt exactly. What guidance scale setting was likely used?

options.text: No guidance scale was used at all

exercises.explain: When images look nearly identical and match the prompt precisely, that's a sign of high guidance scale — strong adherence, low diversity.

exercises.prompt: You're designing an AI poster generator. You want LOTS of creative variety between posters, even if they don't perfectly match your exact text prompt every time. What should you do with the guidance scale?

options.text: Set the guidance scale low, to allow more creative freedom and variety
Set the guidance scale extremely high, to maximize variety
Remove the guidance scale setting completely so it does nothing
Guidance scale has no effect on variety, so it doesn't matter

exercises.explain: Lowering the guidance scale gives the AI more freedom to explore creative variations instead of strictly matching the prompt, which increases diversity between outputs.
